# wowmcp.ai

World of Warcraft Model Context Protocol server for AI agents.

> 10 tools for WoW data. COAI-certified, SOV3-attested. By MEOK AI Labs.

Part of the [MEOK Gaming hive](https://meok.ai/gaming) — the sovereign organic mesh of MCP servers for game data.

## Quick start

```bash
npm install @csoai-org/blizzard-wow-mcp
# or via Smithery
npx -y @smithery/cli install @csoai-org/blizzard-wow-mcp
# or via GitHub
git clone https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/blizzard-wow-mcp
cd blizzard-wow-mcp && npm install && npm start
```

## Sister servers

- [github.com/CSOAI-ORG/mmoagent-mcp](https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/mmoagent-mcp) — 6 cross-game intelligence tools
- [github.com/CSOAI-ORG/evergame-hive-mcp](https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/evergame-hive-mcp) — 4 data-moat tools

## Compliance

COAI INTELLIGENCE_ONLY — no automated character actions. Signed Ed25519 receipts on every Pro call.

## Parent

[MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai) · [CSOAI](https://csoai.org) · [ProofOf.AI](https://proofof.ai)
